summary: Added a focused M7 UI regression matrix in tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts. The new Chromium Playwright coverage exercises system, English, and Simplified Chinese locale paths, language switching, player-mode key hygiene, console-error capture, and supported Beta viewport checks while keeping the test observable-only and outside sim-core or Pixi authority.

tests_run.result: Clean working tree before writing the handoff.
Listed active tasks; M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 is in progress.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001

tests_run.result: No whitespace or patch formatting issues.
Playwright chromium suite passed: 22 tests, 22 passed.
Electron security preferences passed; allowed IPC channels are desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.
format, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.

decisions.result: Kept the regression matrix in tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts so the M7 shell, locale, and command-boundary checks stay close to the existing web-shell coverage and remain observable-only.
Used the existing Chromium Playwright suite plus desktop security smoke; no release, signing, telemetry, account, cloud-save, or commercial workflow was added.

risks: Chromium-only E2E does not cover Firefox, Edge, or Windows DPI/localization permutations; those remain for the M7 platform/resolution localization matrix task.
The matrix deliberately verifies observable behavior only and does not inspect authoritative WorldState or Pixi internals.
requested_action: Review the new M7 UI regression matrix test and the recorded evidence. Accept if the locale, viewport, console-error, and player-mode key-hygiene coverage is sufficient, or request changes with exact failing evidence.
